name: Biglari Holdings Inc.
summary: Part I Biglari Holdings Inc. is a holding company owning subsidiaries engaged in a number of diverse business activities, including property and casualty insurance and reinsurance, licensing and media, restaurants, and oil and gas. The Companys largest operating subsidiaries are involved in the franchising and operating of restaurants.
